title: BREAKING: Iran rejects ceasefire via IRNA — demands permanent end to war
snippet: Iran rejects ceasefire via IRNA, conveying response to US via Pakistan. Emphasizes necessity of permanent end to the war.

title: BREAKING: Adviser to Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf REJECTS Trump deal
snippet: ALERT: Adviser to Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf REJECTS Trump deal. BREAKING NEWS.

title: Axios: Trump may delay attacks on Iran if real signs of a deal seen
snippet: Axios: Trump may delay attacks on Iranian infrastructure if he sees real signs of a deal.

title: Iran rejects Trump's peace deal — Trump has 20 hours to surrender
snippet: Iran rejects Trump's peace deal. Adviser warns Trump has '20 hours' to surrender — or allies face 'back to the Stone Age'.

title: WSJ: US and Iran positions remain too far apart for ceasefire before deadline
snippet: WSJ: US and Iran positions remain too far apart for a ceasefire before Trump's deadline.

title: Axios: Trump may hold off on strikes, extend deadline if deal seen
snippet: Axios: Trump may hold off on tomorrow's strikes against civilian infrastructure in Iran and extend deadline if he sees deal coming together, defense official says.

title: Trump may delay potential strikes if meaningful progress toward deal is seen
snippet: Geopolitical Update: Trump may delay potential strikes on Iran if meaningful progress toward deal is seen. Iran responded with 10-point proposal.

title: Oman and Iran discuss Strait of Hormuz transit amid ceasefire doubts
snippet: Oman & Iran discuss Strait of Hormuz transit amid ceasefire doubts.

title: BREAKING: US oil prices extend gains to $115.50/barrel, up +110% since Dec 2025 low
snippet: US oil prices extend gains to $115.50/barrel, now up +110% since the December 2025 low. Inflation expectations are rising.

title: BREAKING: Iran delivered 10-point response to US 15-point peace plan
snippet: Iran has delivered its highly anticipated 10-point response to the US 15-point peace plan. Points include: 1. Guarantee Iran will not be attacked again 2. Permanent end to war, not ceasefire 3. End Israeli strikes in Lebanon 4.

title: Trump: OPEN THE F****N STRAIT — living in hell if Hormuz not opened
snippet: Trump: 'OPEN THE F****N STRAIT' — Trump threatens Iran with 'living in hell' if Strait of Hormuz not opened. Declares Tuesday 'power plant and bridge day.'

title: Trump: I want to seize Iran's oil — it's there for the taking
snippet: President Trump says he wants to seize Iran's oil. It's there for the taking. There's not a thing they could do about it.

title: Trump considers charging tolls for ships passing through Strait of Hormuz
snippet: Trump considers charging tolls for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: BREAKING: Trump will hold military news conference tomorrow 1PM ET
snippet: Trump will hold military news conference tomorrow 1PM ET — 3 hours after 48-hour Iran warning expires. Declares Tuesday 'power plant and bridge day.'

title: Trump: Every bridge in Iran will be decimated by 12 o'clock tomorrow night
snippet: We have a plan where every bridge in Iran will be decimated by 12 o'clock tomorrow night, every power plant will be out of business.

title: Russia Demands US Drop Ultimatums Offers Mediation — Iran Rejects US Ceasefire Terms
snippet: Russia Demands US Drop Ultimatums Offers Mediation; Iran Rejects US Ceasefire Terms; US Isfahan Flop.

title: Iran rejects 45-day ceasefire proposal — wants permanent end to war
snippet: Iran rejects a 45-day ceasefire proposal, saying it wants a permanent end to the war rather than a temporary pause.

title: BREAKING: Donald Trump rejects ceasefire he proposed to Iran
snippet: BREAKING NEWS: Donald Trump rejects ceasefire he proposed to Iran.

title: Fear: ROBO Put/Call Ratio at 1.0 — highest in at least 20 years
snippet: Fear among retail investors is rising: The ROBO Put/Call Ratio is up to 1.0, the highest in at least 20 years.

title: Gold average trading volume $361B/day in 2025 — nearly 3x 2021
snippet: Gold now trades more than most major financial assets in the world: Average trading volume in gold averaged ~$361 billion per day in 2025, nearly 3x 2021.
